description: Staff Management Frontend - Angular UI for managing staff members with role assignment, color/avatar identity, shift schedule editor, and full CRUD with soft deactivation

userStories.title: Staff models and mock API service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript interfaces and a mock-capable API service for staff so that the frontend can work without a real backend.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/models/staff.models.ts defines: StaffRole union type ('manager' | 'staff_member'), ShiftBlock interface ({ startTime: string; endTime: string }), DayOfWeek union type ('monday' | 'tuesday' | 'wednesday' | 'thursday' | 'friday' | 'saturday' | 'sunday'), WeeklySchedule interface (Partial<Record<DayOfWeek, ShiftBlock[]>>), StaffMemberResponse interface ({ id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string; role: StaffRole; color: string; photoUrl: string | null; isActive: boolean; schedule: WeeklySchedule; createdAtUtc: string; updatedAtUtc: string | null }), CreateStaffMemberRequest interface ({ firstName: string; lastName: string; role: StaffRole; color: string; photoUrl: string | null; schedule: WeeklySchedule }), UpdateStaffMemberRequest (same shape as CreateStaffMemberRequest)
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/models/index.ts exports all models

libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/staff-api.service.ts created with StaffApiService injectable: getAll(): Observable<StaffMemberResponse[]>, create(request): Observable<StaffMemberResponse>, update(id, request): Observable<StaffMemberResponse>, deactivate(id): Observable<void>, reactivate(id): Observable<void> — uses HttpClient, base URL /api/staff
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/staff-api.service.spec.ts contains unit tests verifying correct HTTP verb and URL for each method
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/index.ts exports StaffApiService
.gitkeep files removed from staff/models/ and staff/data-access/
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
userStories.notes: Follow the same pattern as ServiceApiService in libs/chairly/src/lib/services/data-access/service-api.service.ts. deactivate uses PATCH /api/staff/{id}/deactivate, reactivate uses PATCH /api/staff/{id}/reactivate.

userStories.title: NgRx SignalStore for staff state
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a SignalStore that manages the staff list so that components have a single source of truth with loading and error state.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/staff.store.ts created with StaffStore using NgRx SignalStore
State shape: { staffMembers: StaffMemberResponse[]; isLoading: boolean; error: string | null }

Methods: loadAll() (calls StaffApiService.getAll, sets isLoading during call), addStaffMember(member: StaffMemberResponse) (appends to list), updateStaffMember(member: StaffMemberResponse) (replaces by id), deactivateStaffMember(id: string) (sets isActive: false on matching member), reactivateStaffMember(id: string) (sets isActive: true on matching member)

libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/staff.store.spec.ts covers: initial state is empty/not loading, loadAll sets staffMembers, addStaffMember appends, updateStaffMember replaces by id, deactivateStaffMember sets isActive false, reactivateStaffMember sets isActive true
StaffStore exported from libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/data-access/index.ts
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
userStories.notes: Follow the same pattern as ServiceStore in libs/chairly/src/lib/services/data-access/service.store.ts.

userStories.title: Staff avatar component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a visual avatar for each staff member so I can quickly identify them.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-avatar.component.ts and .html created with selector chairly-staff-avatar
Inputs: color: InputSignal<string>, initials: InputSignal<string> (2 chars), photoUrl: InputSignal<string | null>, size: InputSignal<'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'> with default 'md'
When photoUrl is non-null: renders a circular with the photo (w-8/w-10/w-14 depending on size, rounded-full, object-cover)
When photoUrl is null: renders a colored circle with background-color set via [style.background-color]="color()" and initials centered in white text
Size sm = w-8 h-8, md = w-10 h-10, lg = w-14 h-14
Component uses OnPush, standalone: true, templateUrl:
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-avatar.component.spec.ts: renders initials when no photoUrl, renders img when photoUrl provided, applies correct size class for each size value
Component exported from libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/index.ts (create index.ts if it does not exist)
.gitkeep removed from staff/ui/
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
userStories.notes: Use [style.background-color] binding for the color property since it is a dynamic hex value, not a Tailwind class. No dark: variant needed on the colored circle itself — the color is user-chosen.

userStories.title: Staff table component
userStories.description: As an owner or manager, I want to see all staff members in a table so I can get an overview and take actions on each.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-table.component.ts and .html created with selector chairly-staff-table
Input: staffMembers: InputSignal<StaffMemberResponse[]>
Outputs: edit: OutputEmitterRef<StaffMemberResponse>, deactivate: OutputEmitterRef<StaffMemberResponse>, reactivate: OutputEmitterRef<StaffMemberResponse>

Table columns: Avatar (uses <chairly-staff-avatar size="sm">), Naam (firstName + lastName), Rol (Dutch: 'Manager' for manager, 'Medewerker' for staff_member), Status badge ('Actief' green bg-green-100 text-green-700 / 'Inactief' gray bg-gray-100 text-gray-600), Acties

Acties column: 'Bewerken' button with title='Medewerker bewerken' (primary style), 'Deactiveren' button with title='Medewerker deactiveren' (yellow, only shown when isActive is true), 'Activeren' button with title='Medewerker activeren' (green, only shown when isActive is false)
Inactive rows have opacity-60 applied
Empty state shows paragraph 'Geen medewerkers gevonden' when staffMembers() is empty
Component uses OnPush, standalone: true, templateUrl:

libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-table.component.spec.ts: renders staff member row, shows 'Medewerker' for staff_member role, shows 'Deactiveren' when isActive true, shows 'Activeren' when isActive false, emits edit event on Bewerken click, emits deactivate event on Deactiveren click, emits reactivate event on Activeren click, shows empty state when list is empty

userStories.title: Staff form dialog — basic info
userStories.description: As an owner or manager, I want to create or edit a staff member's name, role, and color so that I can maintain an accurate team list.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-form-dialog.component.ts and .html created with selector chairly-staff-form-dialog
Input: staffMember: InputSignal<StaffMemberResponse | null> (null = create mode)
Outputs: save: OutputEmitterRef<CreateStaffMemberRequest>, cancel: OutputEmitterRef<void>

Form fields with Dutch labels: Voornaam (text, required, maxlength 100), Achternaam (text, required, maxlength 100), Rol (select with options 'Manager' / 'Medewerker', required), Kleur (10 color circles from palette: #6366f1 #8b5cf6 #ec4899 #ef4444 #f97316 #eab308 #22c55e #14b8a6 #3b82f6 #64748b — selected circle shows ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-gray-400), Foto URL (optional text input, placeholder 'https://')
Dialog title: 'Medewerker toevoegen' in create mode, 'Medewerker bewerken' in edit mode
Uses <dialog> with showModal() and full-screen overlay: fixed inset-0 m-0 w-screen h-screen max-w-none max-h-none flex items-center justify-center border-0 bg-black/50 p-4
Inner dialog content div: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-xl w-full max-w-lg mx-auto max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto
Body scroll locked: inject DOCUMENT, set document.body.style.overflow='hidden' on open, '' on close
Buttons: 'Opslaan' (bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700, disabled when form invalid), 'Annuleren'
Pre-fills form values when staffMember() is not null
Uses typed ReactiveFormsModule FormGroup
Component uses OnPush, standalone: true, templateUrl:

libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/staff-form-dialog.component.spec.ts: create mode renders empty form, edit mode pre-fills firstName/lastName/role/color, Opslaan button is disabled when form is invalid, save output emits with correct payload on valid submit, cancel output emits on Annuleren click
Component exported from libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/index.ts
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Follow the same dialog pattern as service-form-dialog.component. The save output always emits CreateStaffMemberRequest shape — the list page decides whether to call create or update based on whether it passed a staffMember input. Default color when creating: #6366f1 (first in palette).

userStories.title: Shift schedule editor component
userStories.description: As an owner or manager, I want to define per-day shifts for a staff member so that the system knows when they are available.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/shift-schedule-editor.component.ts and .html created with selector chairly-shift-schedule-editor
Input: schedule: InputSignal<WeeklySchedule>
Output: scheduleChange: OutputEmitterRef<WeeklySchedule>
Renders 7 rows in order: Maandag, Dinsdag, Woensdag, Donderdag, Vrijdag, Zaterdag, Zondag

Each row has: day label, a checkbox labeled 'Werkdag' (checked when day has any shifts), when checked shows existing shift blocks each with start time <input type='time'>, end time <input type='time'>, and remove button (×), and a '+ Dienst toevoegen' button to add a new shift block (default startTime: '09:00', endTime: '17:00')
When 'Werkdag' is unchecked for a day, that day's shifts are removed (empty array / key removed from schedule)
Inline validation: if a shift block's endTime <= startTime, show 'Eindtijd moet na begintijd liggen' error below that block
On any change (add/remove block, time change) emits updated WeeklySchedule via scheduleChange
Component uses OnPush, standalone: true, templateUrl:

Embedded inside staff-form-dialog.component.html as a new 'Werkrooster' section below the basic info fields — import ShiftScheduleEditorComponent in staff-form-dialog and add <chairly-shift-schedule-editor> bound to the form's schedule value
The staffMember input in SM-005 must now also pre-fill the schedule when editing
The save payload from the dialog must include the schedule field

libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/shift-schedule-editor.component.spec.ts: adding a shift block increases block count for that day, removing a block decreases count, emits updated schedule on change, shows validation error when endTime <= startTime
Component exported from libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/ui/index.ts
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Manage local mutable state for the schedule inside this component using a signal (toSignal or plain signal). Emit the full updated WeeklySchedule on every change. Use DayOfWeek type from staff.models.ts for iteration. The day-to-Dutch-label mapping: monday→Maandag, tuesday→Dinsdag, wednesday→Woensdag, thursday→Donderdag, friday→Vrijdag, saturday→Zaterdag, sunday→Zondag.

userStories.title: Staff list page and routing
userStories.description: As an owner or manager, I want to navigate to a staff list page at /medewerkers so I can manage the team.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/feature/staff-list-page/staff-list-page.component.ts and .html created, selector: chairly-staff-list-page
Smart container: injects StaffStore and StaffApiService
On init calls store.loadAll() which internally calls StaffApiService.getAll()
Page header: <h1> with text 'Medewerkers' and a '+ Medewerker toevoegen' button (bg-primary-600)
Shows 'Laden...' text while store.isLoading() is true
Renders <chairly-staff-table [staffMembers]="store.staffMembers()"> with edit/deactivate/reactivate event handlers
Edit event: sets selectedStaff signal and opens form dialog in edit mode

Deactivate event: opens confirmation dialog (reuse ConfirmationDialogComponent from shared if it exists at libs/shared/src/lib/ui/, otherwise use window.confirm); on confirm calls StaffApiService.deactivate(id).subscribe(() => store.deactivateStaffMember(id))
Reactivate event: calls StaffApiService.reactivate(id).subscribe(() => store.reactivateStaffMember(id)) directly (no confirmation needed)

Save event from form dialog: if selectedStaff is null calls StaffApiService.create(request).subscribe(member => store.addStaffMember(member)); if selectedStaff is set calls StaffApiService.update(id, request).subscribe(member => store.updateStaffMember(member)); closes dialog after save
Cancel event from form dialog: closes dialog
Component uses OnPush, standalone: true, templateUrl:
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/feature/index.ts exports StaffListPageComponent
.gitkeep removed from staff/feature/
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/staff.routes.ts created at domain root with: export const staffRoutes: Route[] = [{ path: '', component: StaffListPageComponent, providers: [StaffStore, StaffApiService] }]
apps/chairly/src/app/app.routes.ts updated: { path: 'medewerkers', loadChildren: () => import('@org/chairly-lib').then(m => m.staffRoutes) } added inside shell children array
libs/chairly/src/index.ts exports staffRoutes
libs/chairly/src/lib/staff/feature/staff-list-page/staff-list-page.component.spec.ts: renders staff table, clicking '+ Medewerker toevoegen' sets dialog to open, save event triggers create API call
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t test --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Check if ConfirmationDialogComponent exists at libs/shared/src/lib/ui/ before deciding to use window.confirm. Follow the same page layout pattern as service-list-page.component. The form dialog is rendered in the template with *ngIf or @if bound to a showDialog signal.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E tests for staff management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the staff pages so regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/chairly-e2e/src/staff.spec.ts created with 7 test cases using page.route() to mock /api/staff
Test 1: navigating to /medewerkers shows h1 'Medewerkers' and a table row for the mocked staff member
Test 2: mocked staff member shows full name, role label 'Medewerker', and status badge 'Actief'
Test 3: clicking '+ Medewerker toevoegen' opens the form dialog (dialog element is visible)
Test 4: filling Voornaam + Achternaam + selecting rol + clicking Opslaan — verifies POST /api/staff was called and new member appears in table
Test 5: clicking button with title='Medewerker bewerken' opens dialog pre-filled with the staff member's first name
Test 6: clicking button with title='Medewerker deactiveren' shows confirmation; confirming calls PATCH /api/staff/{id}/deactivate and member shows 'Inactief' badge
Test 7: 'Medewerkers' link is visible in the sidebar nav and clicking it navigates to /medewerkers
npx nx affected -t lint --base=main passes
npx nx affected -t build --base=main passes
userStories.notes: Follow the same page.route() mocking pattern as apps/chairly-e2e/src/services.spec.ts. For test 6, use page.keyboard.press('Escape') if the confirmation is inside a showModal() dialog — or use window.confirm mock. Mock PATCH requests by checking request.method() === 'PATCH' inside the route handler.
